task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
ARCHITECTURE:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Authenticated Todo API (Level 5)        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  POST /api/register  вҶ’  create user      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  POST /api/login     вҶ’  return JWT token в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  GET /api/todos      вҶ’  list user's todosв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  POST /api/todos     вҶ’  create todo      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  PUT /api/todos/:id  вҶ’  update (auth)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  DELETE /api/todos/:id вҶ’ delete (auth)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Database: Users (email, password)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            Todos (title, done, user_id)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend

owner is 'owner@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  saved_user = save credentials to Users
  send back saved_user with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  found_user = look up User with email is credentials's email
  guard found_user is not empty or 'Invalid email or password'
  guard found_user's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid email or password'
  send back {token is ('bearer_' + found_user's id)} with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  my_todos = get all Todos where user_id is caller's id
  send back my_todos

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  todo's user_id is caller's id
  saved_todo = save todo to Todos
  send back saved_todo with status 201

when user calls PUT /api/todos/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  existing = look up Todo with id is this id
  guard existing's user_id is caller's id or 'Unauthorized'
  updated = save changes to Todos
  send back updated with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/todos/:id:
  requires login
  existing = look up Todo with id is this id
  guard existing's user_id is caller's id or 'Unauthorized'
  delete the Todo with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200
